channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: 2026 Budget Week Highlights: Gambling Reforms and Koorie Youth Summit Announced
item.description: Budget week has arrived in Canberra, marking one of the most predictable political events of the year. Treasurer Jim Chalmers is set to deliver his fifth budget to the House of Representatives on Tues...

item.title: Indane, HPCL, and Bharat Gas Advise Consumers on Safe LPG Delivery Practices to Avoid OTP Fraud
item.description: Oil marketing companies Indane, HP Gas, and Bharat Gas have issued an important advisory for domestic LPG users in India, following a rise in scams related to digital deliveries. The advisory warns cu...

item.title: Increased Federal Allocations Haven’t Eased Nigerians’ Hardship
item.description: Even though the federal allocations to Nigerian states don increase sharply since fuel subsidy removal in May 2023, the people dem still dey suffer bad. FAAC monthly distributions don jump from N3.35 ...

item.title: Constitutional Court Rules on Phala Phala Case; Ramaphosa Faces Next Steps
item.description: The Constitutional Court recently found that the National Assembly erred by deciding not to investigate the Phala Phala incident, highlighting the judiciary's firm commitment to upholding the Constitu...

item.title: Winnie Odinga Celebrates Mother’s Day with Ida Odinga and Graca Machel
item.description: Winnie Odinga celebrated Mother’s Day in a memorable way with her mother, Ida Odinga, and Mozambican politician Graca Machel. Sharing heartfelt posts on social media on May 10, Winnie posted pictures ...

item.title: Australia Names Three New Players for Pakistan and Bangladesh White-Ball Tours
item.description: Australia cricket team has announced its squads for the upcoming white-ball tours of Pakistan and Bangladesh, using these series as an opportunity to test their bench strength. The selectors have incl...

item.title: JPMorgan Employee Files Lawsuit Alleging Workplace Sexual Assault
item.description: A former vice president at JPMorgan Chase, Chirayu Rana, has lodged a lawsuit against his former manager, Lorna Hajdini, claiming a disturbing pattern of sexual harassment and assault. Rana alleges th...

item.title: Punjab Board Class 10 Results 2026 Announced: Check Details and Toppers List
item.description: The Punjab School Education Board (PSEB) has announced the Class 10 board examination results for the year 2026. The results are officially released on May 11, 2026, at 12.30 pm and are available for ...

item.title: Macron Meets President Ruto in Nairobi Ahead of Africa Forward Summit
item.description: On Sunday, French President Emmanuel Macron touched down in Nairobi, Kenya, where he met with President William Ruto ahead of the two-day Africa Forward summit starting Monday. The visit forms part of...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi and C. Joseph Vijay Begin New Political Collaboration in Tamil Nadu
item.description: The swearing-in of the new Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) government in Chennai has indicated a significant shift in political alliances in Tamil Nadu. Congress leader Rahul Gandhi was present on stag...

item.title: Imo Governor Hope Uzodimma Declares Interest in Imo West Senate Seat
item.description: Governor Hope Uzodimma of Imo State don announce say he wan contest for Imo West Senatorial District seat for 2027. Dis announcement come two years and four months after him start him second term as g...

item.title: Canada-India Collaboration Advances Pulse Protein Research to Enhance Food Security
item.description: Canada and India have launched the Canada-India Pulse Protein Centre of Excellence, a collaborative initiative designed to strengthen food security through research and innovation in pulse proteins. C...

item.title: Pali Lehohla argues South Africa’s economy has extracted trillions from citizens through unequal policy outcomes
item.description: Statistician and analyst Pali Lehohla argues that South Africa’s democratic era has failed to deliver broad-based economic justice, with data from his “Lehohla Ledger” suggesting that the country’s ec...

item.title: Brad Raffensperger Faces Challenges in Georgia GOP Governor Race Amid MAGA Influence
item.description: Brad Raffensperger, Georgia’s current secretary of state, is attempting to secure the Republican nomination for governor in a state increasingly dominated by MAGA-aligned politics. Known nationally fo...

item.title: 25 sacrificial goats stolen in Karachi ahead of Eid ul Adha
item.description: KARACHI: In a troubling incident ahead of Eid ul Adha, 25 sacrificial goats valued at over Rs1.9 million were reportedly stolen from a plot in Gulistan-e-Jauhar, Karachi. According to local police and...

item.title: Sagay Unveils Mural Honoring Artist Nunelucio Alvarado
item.description: Sagay City in Negros Occidental recently unveiled a 30-meter mural honoring Nunelucio 'Nune' Alvarado, a 76-year-old socio-realist artist living with dementia. Alvarado has been a significant figure i...

item.title: Househelp Cleared of Child Poisoning After Postmortem Confirms Pneumonia as Cause of Death
item.description: In Ruai, Nairobi, a househelp named Joyce Onyango has been released after being accused of poisoning her employer’s four-year-old daughter. Joyce had previously left her employer, Anne Wanjiru, over a...

item.title: Keli Holiday Cancels US Show After Border Issues on North American Tour
item.description: Australian musician Keli Holiday, known for his hit song Dancing2, had to cancel a show in New York City after being refused entry back into the US at the Canadian border, despite having the proper vi...

item.title: Cardoso confirms Ndamane will start in upcoming crucial Sundowns matches
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns coach Miguel Cardoso has expressed full confidence in defender Khulumani Ndamane ahead of important fixtures, despite the player’s recent errors. Ndamane’s mistakes in the 1-1 draw w...

item.title: TCIM programme enhances learning in Nigerian schools through storytelling
item.description: The Camera Is Me (TCIM) initiative na youth-focused educational platform wey dey mix storytelling, language learning, and personal development. Since e start in 2018, e don reach over 5,000 students f...
